name: KungFu VR
summary:
Game Features:
1.Unique KungFu Themes: Explore 10 different styles of KungFu Themes, including Dragon Fist, Tai Chi, Swordsmanship, healing, Chinese Boxing among others.
2.Professional KungFu Movements: Master over hundreds of unique, full-body KungFu movements and techniques, designed to offer a comprehensive and immersive experience.
VR Fitness Made Fun: Kung Fu is a kind of Sports, Enhance your body's balance,  Kung Fu technique, strength, flexibility, and coordination in a fun and engaging way....
